## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json --noEmit`
- [ ] `npx vitest run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:size`
- [ ] `npm run test:package`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`

## Checklist

- [ ] Base branch is `rc`
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests, or I explained why tests are not needed
- [ ] README / docs were updated if the public API or setup flow changed
- [ ] I verified published entrypoints still match the intended import paths
